questions.question: What can happen if rocks are not weathered in the context of the movement of Earth's materials?
questions.option_3: Mass movement would be more frequent

questions.question: Which of the following is the easternmost range of the Himalayas?
Which region of India is most suitable for tea cultivation due to its climate and soil?
Which state became the leading beneficiary of the Green Revolution in India?
In which of the following regions in India are Tropical Evergreen Forests found?
What evidence supports the layered structure of the Earth’s interior?
Pamban Port is located in which state of India?
Which of the following factors best explains the formation of ox-bow lakes along river courses?
questions.option_2: Sudden uplift of riverbeds by tectonic activity
questions.option_4: Lateral erosion on the outer banks and deposition on the inner banks

questions.question: Which of the following is the first biosphere reserve established in India?
Which term refers to the pre-monsoon showers that occur with a sudden rise in temperature, especially in southern India?
Which of the following zones receives vertical rays of the Sun throughout the year?
The Bhabar region lies in which part of the Great Plains?
questions.option_2: Adjacent to the foothills of the Himalayas

questions.question: The Kopili Hydro Electric Project is located in which Indian state?
Geographically, Bhutan is divided into four regions. Which of the following is NOT a name of those divisions?
As of March 14, 2024, which of the following is the world's highest railway bridge?
Which of the following Indian states has all three types of physical divisions – plateau, plains, and coastal plains?
Which of the following statements about the Peninsular Plateau of India is NOT correct?
questions.option_1: The Peninsular plateau consists of three broad divisions, namely, the Northern Highlands, Central Highlands and the Deccan Plateau.
questions.option_2: The Deccan Plateau is a triangular landmass that lies to the south of the river Narmada.
questions.option_3: The Peninsular plateau is a tableland composed of the old crystalline, igneous and metamorphic rocks.
questions.option_4: The Western Ghats are higher than the Eastern Ghats.

questions.question: Which Indian State contributes the most to commercial floriculture cultivation, accounting for more than 20% of the country's total production in FY 2024?
Which geographical feature separates India from Sri Lanka?
questions.option_2: Palk Strait and Gulf of Mannar

questions.question: The Chagos Archipelago, recently in the news, is a disputed territory between which two countries?
A significant river of the Indian Desert, Luni originates from western slopes of the Aravalli ranges near which place in Rajasthan?
The Rihand Hydroelectric Project is located in which district of Uttar Pradesh?
What is the main reason behind the formation of lagoons along the Eastern Coastal Plains?
questions.option_1: Sand deposition along the shallow coastlines
questions.option_2: Tectonic activity and fault line shifts
questions.option_3: Coral reef development and volcanic islands
questions.option_4: Deposition by rivers and wave action along the coast
